# harvester_pci_device (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Attach PCI devices to a VM via passthrough
# PCI devices must be enabled for passthrough in Harvester UI first.

resource "harvester_pci_device" "gpu" {
  name      = "gpu-passthrough"
  namespace = "default"

  vm_name   = "default/my-vm"
  node_name = "node-01"

  # PCI addresses in format "0000:XX:YY.Z"
  pci_addresses = [
    "0000:01:00.0",
    "0000:01:00.1",
  ]

  labels = {
    device-type = "gpu"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name
- `node_name` (String) The node where the PCI devices are available. The VM must run on this node.
- `pci_addresses` (List of String) List of PCI addresses to passthrough (format: '0000:XX:YY.Z'). Devices must be enabled for passthrough in Harvester.
- `vm_name` (String) The name of the virtual machine to attach PCI devices to. Format: 'namespace/name' or 'name' (if in default namespace).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `namespace` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
